headline: Xi hosts Laos leader, prepares North Korea visit as Dutch warship transits Taiwan Strait
headline_zh: 习近平会晤老挝领导人，拟访朝鲜，荷兰军舰过台海
narrative: Today's dual-track diplomacy and coercion signal a calibrated approach. Xi Jinping's meeting with Laos' Thongloun reinforces Belt and Road solidarity, while the planned North Korea visit (next week) underscores continued alignment with Pyongyang against US pressure. Simultaneously, the PLA's strong response to a Dutch warship's Taiwan Strait transit, including a near-simultaneous incursion into Xisha airspace, demonstrates tested deterrence. Markets sold off broadly (SSE -1.38%, ChiNext -3.2%), partly on geopolitical jitters and JPMorgan's cautious outlook on Hong Kong internet stocks. Domestically, the CBA title win offers a rare feel-good moment, but the CAC's AI security testing announcement and the housing fund expansion signal continuous regulatory and social policy fine-tuning.
narrative_zh: 今日的双轨外交与威慑信号展现了一种精心校准的策略。习近平与老挝通伦的会谈强化了‘一带一路’团结，而计划中的下周访朝则凸显继续与平壤协调应对美国压力。与此同时，解放军对荷兰军舰过航台湾海峡及此前进入西沙领空的强烈回应展示了既定威慑。大盘普遍下跌（上证-1.38%，创业板-3.2%），部分受地缘紧张情绪及摩根大通对港股互联网的谨慎展望影响。国内，CBA夺冠是稀有的正面新闻，但网信办的AI安全测试公告和公积金扩围显示监管与社会政策的持续微调。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4027.736 ▼1.38% · Shenzhen Component 15314.7 ▼2.48% · ChiNext 3957.935 ▼3.20% · USD/CNY 6.765 ▼0.12% · USD/CNH 6.7888 ▲0.23%
